headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.paypal.com https://www.sandbox.paypal.com https://*.paypalobjects.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://www.paypalobjects.com https://*.paypal.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.paypal.com https://www.sandbox.paypal.com https://*.paypalobjects.com; frame-src 'self' https://www.paypal.com https://www.sandbox.paypal.com;
